messages.subject: [OGRUG] spatial analysis in R
messages.body_plain:
Hello,

I am working in a research project at University of Calgary focusing
on spatial statistical analysis and modelling with too many zeros.

I am struggling with r scripts and packages.

Is there anyone expertise in spatial modelling? Please let me know
then I might go with more specific questions.

Thanks,

Azad
Research Assistatnt
University of Calgary
